# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We actively support and apply security patches to the following versions of FluxMedia:

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| 1.6.x   | ✅ Yes    |
| < 1.6   | ❌ No     |

---

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of FluxMedia seriously. If you find a security vulnerability, please do **not** file a public issue on GitHub. Instead, report it privately.

To report a vulnerability:
1. Email the maintainer at `pdev.labs@gmail.com` (or open a private security advisory on the GitHub repository if available).
2. Provide a detailed description of the vulnerability, including a proof of concept (PoC), steps to reproduce, and potential impact.

We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and work with you to patch and coordinate a public release timeline.
